voice_name_hint: Daniel — Conversational, en-US baritone. Override via HEYGEN_VOICE_ID in .env.

settings.delivery_notes: Conversational, low-affect, slightly dry. Not hype-voice. HeyGen's emotion knob is coarse — keep it on Friendly and let the script's pauses do the work. Land the final 'Safely.' soft, not punched.

lines.text: Your AI agent just leaked a key.
Rafter would've caught it — in the pre-commit hook, before the push, before the bill.
Rafter is the security primitive for AI-first dev.
We're built by agents. Shipped at agent velocity. Dogfooded on every commit you're watching.
One CLI, eight platforms — Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, Windsurf, and the rest. Same scan. Same contract.
Audit third-party skills before they run. Block destructive commands by policy. Sign every event into a tamper-evident log.
Your agents get guardrails. For free. Local-only. No telemetry.
Scale up to remote SAST, SCA, and agentic analysis when you need it.
